programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Its a brand new start for the Operation Repo team when Lou bets big on a high-risk opportunity and sets up shop in Las Vegas! But first Ronnie and Froy must wrangle a wrestling ring from an lucha libre school and Carlos and Matt have to break up a Botox party when they go after a car owned by a upper class housewife Then on their first repo in Vegas a live tiger stands between the team and a truck and it seems like Vegas is more than they can handle If they complete their mission the payout could be enormous but will they be able to resist the temptations of Sin City

programme.title: My Pal Trigger
programme.desc: Gabby refuses to mate his stallion with Roys horse When his horse runs away from the house he blames Roy and gets him jailed

programme.title: High Noon
programme.desc: A town Marshal despite the disagreements of his newlywed bride and the townspeople around him must face a gang of deadly killers alone at high noon when the gang leader an outlaw he sent up years ago arrives on the noon train

programme.title: Broken Arrow
programme.desc: Broken Arrow

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Kimble and a beautiful trucking dispatcher fall in love but shes afraid to tell him about legal restrictions against her

programme.title: Sea Hunt
programme.desc: When a nosecones capsule fails to eject after landing in the ocean Mike attempts to locate it and rescue the scientist trapped inside

programme.title: Sea Hunt
programme.desc: A female diving student plots revenge after Mike kicks her out of his diving class

programme.title: 12 OClock High
programme.desc: Gen Savage is suspected by Scotland Yard of killing a pretty model in her flat and even he cannot remember all the events of that night

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: 1795 time periodBarnabas challenges Jeremiah to a duel which Josette and Angelique cannot prevent

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: 1795 time period While Jeremiah lays dying witchhunter Reverand Trask enters Collinwood He ties Victoria to a tree and tries to exorcise her

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Micki discovers that a deadly item from her past has resurfaced a satanic coin that can bring the dead back to life

programme.title: Dark Night of the Scarecrow
programme.desc: In a small Southern town four vigilantes wrongfully execute a mentally-challenged man but after the court sets them free mysterious accidents begin to kill them off one by one

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: During a camping trip the men begin to wonder if their female tracker is a vampire Meanwhile two plane crash survivors whove been feasting on dead passengers are on the verge of rescue when an escaped killer intervenes

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A housewife stressed out by her husbands reckless behavior welcomes an elderly cosmetics saleswoman in to her home Only to discover that the old hag has another more devious motive

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: hen funeral director Ezra Thornberry gets his very polite young nephew Bobby as a roommate he eventually learns his rude harsh behavior towards him could be fatal

programme.title: The HItchhiker
programme.desc: Vicious and ruthless killer Ron and his antsy wimp partner Jimmy Lee Stoler are a couple of escaped convicts on the lam from the law The dangerous duo break into a model home in search of a safe only to discover a family residing in said swanky abode

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Puritanical small town mayor Jake Purly is running for reelection on a strict platform that vehemently opposes sex and pornography However a dark secret from Purlys shady past threatens to resurface and destroy his credibility in the form of lovely escort Dr Rita de Roy

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Tired and worn out Eric accepts the hospitality of an old man at his home in the woods He becomes attracted to a young woman named Margaret but he fears that he may be responsible for a series of brutal murders in the area

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric meets a good witch in the woods who offers to cure him She gives a love potion to a girl whos boyfriend dies after taking it The boys dad blaming her shows up with his buddies and burns her house down with her in it

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: While investigating a series of bizarre murders Nick discovers the villain is a familiar face from his past

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: A racist uses a cursed antique car radio to travel back to 1954 and tries to prevent the arrest and death of his father a member of the KKK

programme.title: Hogans 307
programme.desc: Hogans 307

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: McHale and The Boys have planned some entertainment for the Base Personnel but Binghamton puts a stop to it and orders McHale and his Crew to ferry him to a Staff Meeting so that he can keep an eye on them But after the 73 is put out of commission by a Japanese plane Binghamton if forced to do some entertaining of his own during a mission to obtain some fuel on a Japanese-held island

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: While trying to impress a pretty Nurse Parker receives several serious blows to his morale and humiliated he puts in for a transfer Then complications arise when McHale The Crew and the Nurse work up a plan to try to help him to regain his self-esteem and change his mind

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Carter tries for the Officer Candidate School

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer tries to collect money for Carters birthday

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A bank robber comes to the island to hide from the authorities and holds the castaways prisoner while he waits for his boat after his cover is blown

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The Pentagon is set to launch a new deadly missile that will destroy everything within 100 miles of its path and the island is ground zero

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grandpa and Luke jeopardize Kates chances to be named to a church committee when they unwittingly allow a Las Vegas gambling house to advertise on the McCoys barn

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Much to Grampas consternation George wants to join a private club known as the Loyal Order of the Mystic Nile

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Get Smart

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Hymie is introduced to CONTROL as KAOS tries to kidnap a CONTROL scientist

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJ wrecks his truck and suffers amnesia As he struggles to remember who he is and why two men are attempting to kill him he falls in love with Gypsy and works the bumper car pavilion of her uncles carnival

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Ed rescues a millionaires granddaughter from a runaway horse

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Carols constant chattering has rung up a huge phone bill so she takes a job as a dance instructor to help cover the charges Ed gets in on the act by taking a job selling real estate over the telephone

programme.title: Hogans 311
programme.desc: Hogans 311

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Lou has retired making Sonia the new boss but will she be able to keep the company going without her big brother Matt and Ronnie try to take a car away from of yuppie with an unusual taste for red meat

programme.title: Baby Face Nelson
programme.desc: George Babyface Nelson became one of the most important gangsters of 1930s Chicago by making brutal robberies In order to compete with Al Capone he allied himself with John Dillinger

programme.title: Beverely Hills Brats
programme.desc: A rich young boy arranges to be kidnapped so hell get more attention from his parents

programme.title: Born to Win
programme.desc: A smart-mouthed junkie and loser known as JJ George Segal spends his days looking for just one more fix

programme.title: Dangerous Crossing
programme.desc: A recently married heiress Ruth Stanton Jeanne Crain embarks on a honeymoon cruise with her new husband John Bowman Carl Betz However shortly after getting on board John disappears None of the crew remember seeing him and the ships manifest has Ruth registered alone and under her maiden name Ruth wanders the boat in search of John but soon the captain and crew believe Ruth must be crazy Only kindly Dr Manning Michael Rennie takes her seriously and helps unravel the mystery

programme.title: The Crooked Web
programme.desc: A restaurant owner becomes trapped in a plot to return him to Germany for a murder committed in the war

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: A vessel of alien pacifists bound for Earth lands on the moon They are greeted as friends by all- except Commissioner Simmons who sees their vessel as way to return home

programme.title: Invitation to Hell
programme.desc: A family moves to a suburban town only to be coerced into joining a suspicious club

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Determined to win re-election as Hazzard County Administrator at any cost Boss uses every dirty trick he knows in his campaign against the beautiful Thelma Claire TC Rogers the daughter of Boss old political foe

programme.title: Hercules 212
programme.desc: Hercules 212

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: A high profile mission to Mars is suddenly canceled much to the dismay of the public Involved air force captain Paul Chandler steals Lilis shuttle

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: As the aliens are losing the fight and dying off they decide to use spores to kill off all native life on Earth

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When an attempt on Dr Alec Hollands life leaves him consumed by deadly chemicals and fire the swamps of Louisiana transform him into a superhuman creature hell-bent on ridding the swamp--and the world--of the evil that men do

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When an attempt on Dr Alec Hollands life leaves him consumed by deadly chemicals and fire the swamps of Louisiana transform him into a superhuman creature hell-bent on ridding the swamp--and the world--of the evil that men do

programme.title: Space1999
programme.desc: While exploring an Earth-type world several Alphans including Commander Koenig and Dr Russel disappear after sighting a strange fog Shortly afterwards a race of primitive humans are encountered

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: A computer scientist appalled to discover that his chauffeur was actually Dr Kimble uses his new state-of-the-art computer to assist Gerard and predict Kimbles movements from city to city

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: The once friendly annual rodeo between the Barkley and Morton ranches has become a nasty win-at-all-costs event An ex-slave super cowboy raises the stakes when he agrees to compete for the Barkleys

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: In a politically turbulent Mexico full of revolutionaries Cheyenne encounters a sexy blond pickpocket singer in Rio Hondo She arrived on the stage with a local rancher who owes Cheyenne money from a cattle deal and he wants to be paid

programme.title: Young Riders
programme.desc: Young Riders

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A wealthy woman whose daughter is kidnapped and held for ransom has more faith in a female psychic than Stone and Keller

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: The IMFs target is Poltroni an international drug dealer Poltroni alias Ted Carson is in a country with no extradition treaty with the United States Briggs devises a plan to lure Poltroni to a neighboring country where he can be arrested and sent to the US To execute the scheme Barney will have to fight for his life against one of Poltronis thugs while Cinammon will be bait for Poltroni Also getting Poltroni to the border wont be easy Its about 100 miles away

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A woman invites Friday and Gannon to talk to her Womans Club about battered children They train the women to be on the lookout for children who might be abused and how they can help by becoming foster parents

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon go undercover at a hotel to find the location of an illegal gambling operation Soon after spreading the word theyre looking for some action they are driven to a late-night game in the Hollywood Hills After the game the detectives give the location of the residence to their boss and a raid is set for the following night

programme.desc: While fleeing authorities Dr Kimble discovers a man who is deathly ill and is also being pursued by the law

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The kids learn of a magic river that can get them home On their way to the river however Eric accidentally turns himself into an ugly bogbeast The team must reverse the spell on Eric before the rivers magic runs out

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Quimbys new super computer replaces Gadget leaving him to pursue an alternative career

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Quimby suspects that MAD are planning to steal a precious formula that could end world famine

programme.title: Go Bots
programme.desc: Go Bots

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Cy-Kill flees to Earth in the wake of his failed coup

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: The Herculoids

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Bubblecrafts rise out of the waters Bubblemen are directed by Brotak to kidnap Zandor and TaraAndropon sends his robots to attack the Herculoids only to be defeated Zandor accepts his challenge as he sends his best warrior Ogron

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Monster Minds are planted aboard the Pride to contaminate the water supply The water is jettisoned forcing Herc to land the Pride in search of water and a Cobalt-49 crystal to repair the guidance system damaged by the vines This is all part of Saw Boss trap Flora sees the vines and goes to warn Gillian who is searching for a crystal They are trapped and Gillian falls off a bridge into a river Saw Boss sets another trap knowing Jayce will return for Gillian but Jayce calls upon the ring for help and defeats the Monster Minds and rescues Gillian

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: To lure Jayce to his death Saw Boss puts a marker in the shape of the root on an ice planet that is about to be destroyed by a volcano Herc lands the Pride on the ice which is then nearly covered by an avalanche The native people seek help from Jayce and everyone goes to work building an ice dam and storing up snow to drop into the volcano Monster Minds attack complicating things but they end up helping the people when their lasers blast the dam which prevents the volcano from erupting when all the ice covers it up

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: Researchers in Africa discover a Golden Scarab which they believe to be part of a hidden treasure that belonged to a lost tribe of Egypt Of course VENOM is after the treasure themselves Sly Rax accidentally triggers an ancient device in an underground lake that creates an opening in the walls of Solomons Gorge and reveals the treasure MASK must stop VENOM from escaping with the treasure

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: Thrity years ago Andrew Trakker received a valuable crystal from a tribe of New Guinea mud-men Now having learned the secret of its power and used it to benefit mankind Andrews son Matt is returning it

programme.title: Teknoman
programme.desc: Evil The Resurrected Devil

programme.title: Teknoman
programme.desc: Clash! The Old Red Enemy

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Kid Icarus feels awful because his height is a problem Duke discovers a magic lamp and the genie grants Kid Icaruss wish to become bigger Kid Icarus turns into a giant and comes to realize that being bigger has a lot of disadvantages

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Dragon Lord and Mother Brain try to turn every dragon evil The N team rescues Puff a white last good dragon baby

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Venger enslaved a gnome village with a powerful spell Only a gnome wizard Lukian can break the spell but Venger had trapped Lukian in a most unusual prison

programme.title: Hair Bear Bunch
programme.desc: The Hair Bears fall short on southern hospitality when they wrongly conclude their new roommate is a spy for Peevly and ship the bear out of the zoo on a tourist bus
